what_it_does: Turns a single image into a fully rigged, animation-ready 3D asset with mesh, skeleton, and skinning weights.
succinct_summary: High Morgan relevance: one-image-to-animatable-avatar pipeline that bridges generated geometry and immediate motion use.
possible_use: Candidate reference for creating Morgan avatar bodies that are already rigged and ready for animation/simulation.
important_notes: Emphasize as a core avatar source; inspect install/model requirements before any implementation run.
